note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 2.0 cm x 2.4 cm x 0.9 cm.
  Wound bed: 59% slough, 41% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Physician notified of wound progression.
